versions.description: Beta trial update verification build
changes: Pipeline verification â€” no functional changes

versions.description: CI fix — spec file committed for Windows build pipeline
changes: Committed TMCAA_LMP.spec to repo so GitHub Actions Windows runner can find it

versions.description: CI verification timing fix for release asset availability
changes: Release asset verification now retries up to 5 times with 5-second intervals

versions.description: Deep Windows updater reliability fix
changes: Fixed: SIGTERM does not terminate Waitress on Windows â€” replaced with os._exit(0)
Fixed: updater.bat now waits for main process PID to exit (up to 30 s) before replacing exe
Fixed: move /Y retries up to 10 times with 1 s delay to handle lingering file locks
Fixed: removed pause from bat error path (hung forever with CREATE_NO_WINDOW)
Fixed: increased response flush delay from 0.5 s to 1.5 s for reliable HTTP delivery
Added shutdown_for_update() function with explicit log flush before os._exit
updater.bat logs every step to logs/update.log with timestamps
Bat uses CRLF line endings for Windows cmd.exe compatibility

versions.description: Restart validation test update
changes: UI marker added to confirm successful auto-restart

versions.description: Windows updater fix â€” reliable process termination using taskkill
changes: Removed SIGTERM / os._exit based shutdown â€” bat now handles process termination
updater.bat uses taskkill /F /IM to force-kill the running exe
Added wait loop: bat polls tasklist until exe is fully gone before replacing
Exe image name dynamically detected from sys.executable
Detailed logging in update.log: kill attempt, wait loop, replacement, restart

versions.description: Trial update to validate taskkill-based updater
changes: UI marker to confirm taskkill updater works end-to-end

versions.description: Stable installer-based update system with CI rebuild
changes: Switched to Inno Setup installer for safe, reliable updates
Removed fragile exe self-replacement and batch scripts
Removed SIGTERM / taskkill shutdown logic from Python
Update detection uses HTTP-only â€” no local fallback, explicit errors
CI pipeline rebuilt: builds exe + Inno Setup installer, uploads installer as release asset
Robust logging for manifest fetch, download, and installer launch
Installer handles process termination and restart via Windows Restart Manager

versions.description: Trial update to validate installer-based update system
changes: UI marker to confirm installer update works end-to-end

versions.description: Database configuration wizard for first-run setup
changes: Added first-run database setup wizard at /db-setup
Removed hardcoded DB_PASSWORD default â€” credentials read from .env only
App enters setup mode if MySQL connection fails (no crash)
Professional setup page with host, port, user, password, db name fields
Credentials saved to .env preserving unrelated keys
Installer does not overwrite .env (user data preserved across updates)
DB connection test with clear error messages, no stack traces
Robust logging for setup flow (password never logged)

versions.description: Trial update to validate installer + DB setup build
changes: UI marker to confirm v3.1.0 features deployed correctly

versions.description: Stable installer restart and clean shutdown fix
changes: Installer now launches with 3-second delay after HTTP response is fully sent
Eliminated PyInstaller DLL race condition (_MEIxxxxx/python311.dll error)
Frontend no longer shows infinite spinner during update
Update overlay shows clear close/restart message instead of hanging
Catch handler gracefully handles server shutdown mid-request

versions.description: Fixed MySQL backup path resolution, silent mysqldump failure, and runtime syntax crash
changes: Auto-locate mysqldump via glob scan of all MySQL Server versions on Windows
Backup directory resolved to absolute path (works in frozen exe mode)
File existence and size verified after mysqldump â€” no more silent failures
Full logging: resolved paths, command (password masked), returncode, stderr
Partial/empty backup files cleaned up on failure
Timeout handler added for hung mysqldump processes
Clear error message when mysqldump is not found
Fixed stray return statement causing indentation crash in update_manager.py

versions.description: Installer pipeline verification build
changes: Pipeline validation build â€” no functional changes

versions.description: Automatic database schema validation and repair system
changes: New ensure_schema_integrity() runs on every startup after migrations
Checks members table for required columns via INFORMATION_SCHEMA
Auto-adds missing profile_image_path and status columns if absent
Fully idempotent â€” safe to run repeatedly, only additive repairs
Detailed logging: column exists, column added, repair summary
Eliminates 'Unknown column' crashes on pre-migration databases

versions.description: Trial update verification build
changes: Pipeline verification — no functional changes

versions.description: Fixed installer execution and hard process termination
changes: Installer launched via subprocess.Popen with shell=True for reliable execution
Application force-terminated with os._exit(0) immediately after launching installer
Removed delayed thread shutdown logic â€” no more 3-second timer
Removed SIGTERM usage and graceful Flask shutdown attempts
UI message updated: Installing update... The application will now close.

versions.description: Lifecycle hard-exit verification build
changes: Testing installer launch and hard process termination

versions.description: Restored stable self-updating executable system
changes: Removed installer-based auto update
Restored direct EXE replacement updater
Improved process termination reliability
Installer retained for manual fallback only

versions.description: EXE auto-update lifecycle verification build
changes: Testing EXE replacement updater

versions.description: Added receipt number support (4â€“5 digit unique)
changes: New receipt_number column in members table (VARCHAR(5), UNIQUE, nullable)
Migration 1.6 adds column automatically on client update
Receipt Number field in Add Member and Edit Member forms
4â€“5 digit numeric validation with uniqueness enforcement
Receipt number displayed on member card below LM number
Schema integrity check covers receipt_number column

versions.description: Update pipeline verification test
changes: Update pipeline test

versions.description: Advanced search system and UX improvements
changes: Introduced advanced token-based search with rounded segmented pills
Added slash command filter system (/name, /lm, /course, /cyear, /jdate, /status)
Implemented stacked filters with comma-separated IN-style matching
Added strict AND filter mode toggle (default OR)
Implemented live search updates with debounced fetch
Improved search keyboard navigation for slash command dropdown
Added joining date field with DD/MM/YYYY auto-formatting
Joining date defaults to today when left empty
LM Number placeholder shows the next available number
Added joining year search filter
Renamed Year filter to Course Year for clarity
Improved token UI design with segmented label/value style
Dynamic SQL query builder with LEFT JOIN on member_courses
Database migration 1.7: joining_date DATE column added to members table

versions.description: Update UX improvements and UI fixes
changes: Simplified update completion flow
Removed restart and stay options after update
Users now manually restart the application after updates
Fixed Windows layout issues in advanced search
Minor UI stability improvements

versions.description: Database schema repair and stability improvements
changes: Added automatic creation of member_courses table if missing
Improved schema integrity repair system
Fixed crash when member_courses table was missing
Improved database migration stability

versions.description: Test update release
changes: Test release to verify auto update system
No functional changes

versions.description: Update reliability and CSS deployment fixes
changes: CSS files now always overwrite on startup for frozen builds
Updater batch script retries exe replacement on Windows file locks
Updater process launches in isolated console
Cleaner application shutdown via SIGTERM

versions.description: Trial update for updater verification
changes: Trial update to verify updater pipeline
No functional changes

versions.description: Phone system overhaul â€” validation, cleanup, and whatsapp_number removal
changes: Removed obsolete whatsapp_number field from entire application
Database migration 2.0: DROP COLUMN whatsapp_number from members table
Added backend phone validation with country code and phone number regex
Indian +91 numbers enforced to exactly 10 digits
Duplicate phone number detection before database insert
Phone inputs changed to type=tel with dynamic maxlength based on country code
Search system fully uses member_phones table with LEFT JOIN

versions.description: Schema restructure — FK-based courses/colleges, medical council reg no support, and education system redesign
changes: Renamed tcmc_number to medical_council_reg_no
Medical council registration number now supports alphanumeric values
Courses table redesigned with course_code, course_name, and course_level
Default medical courses added (MBBS, BDS, BAMS, BUMS, BHMS, BNYS, BVSc & AH, BPT, BSMS, MD, MS, MDS, DNB, DM, MCh)
member_courses now uses college_id and course_id foreign keys
Colleges table redesigned with normalized college names
Default college added: GMC, Thiruvananthapuram
Education entry redesigned to College / Course / Joining Year structure
member_phones cleanup and validation improvements
Database migrations updated to 2.3

versions.description: Search system fixes, validation improvements, and UI stabilization
changes: Fixed membership type dropdown behavior in advanced search
Membership number search now limits input to 6 digits with auto-padding
Receipt number search now supports autocomplete and auto-padding
Medical council registration number validation updated to support alphanumeric values
Fixed search token collapse when selecting membership type
Improved validation for receipt number, mobile number, and medical council fields
Search mobile number now supports country code selection
Search phone input now respects length limits per country code
Autocomplete added for college and course fields in search
Dynamic dropdown filtering implemented while typing in search
Add/Edit member forms now support keyboard typing with dropdown suggestions
Course and college inputs now reject values not present in database
Fixed address textarea collapsing after form validation error
Improved search token UI stability
General form validation and search reliability improvements

versions.description: RBAC system, security enforcement, staff management, and UI improvements
changes: Role-based access control (RBAC) system with roles, permissions, and role_permissions tables
Backend permission enforcement on all protected routes via @permission_required decorator
Staff management page with user creation, role assignment, and password reset
Role management with granular permission editor and toggle UI
Dedicated Colleges management page with full CRUD and advanced search
Dedicated Courses management page with full CRUD and advanced search
Inline college and course creation from sidebar without losing form data
Dynamic dropdown refresh after creating college or course
Global Add College and Add Course modals available on every page
Access denied page for unauthorized access attempts
Change password functionality for logged-in users
Sidebar quick-add buttons for Members, Colleges, and Courses
Permission modal scroll fix for long permission lists
Save button disabled by default in permission editor until changes are made
Dynamic search with token-based filters on staff, colleges, and courses pages
Database migration 2.4: roles, permissions, and role_permissions tables

versions.description: RBAC migration compatibility hotfix
changes: Added created_at column to users table for existing databases
Admin account now requires password change on first login after RBAC migration
Idempotent migration safe for fresh and existing installations

versions.description: Education table NULL constraint fix
changes: college_id and course_id in member_courses now allow NULL values
Education rows accepted with any combination of college, course, or year
Completely empty education rows are skipped during insert
Fixed Column college_id cannot be null error when editing members
Database migration 2.6: ALTER member_courses columns to nullable

versions.description: Migration runner fix â€” MySQL unread result error
changes: Migration runner now consumes result sets after each SQL statement
Fixes mysql.connector.errors.InternalError: Unread result found on startup
Safe for SELECT, ALTER TABLE, CREATE TABLE, and INSERT statements

versions.description: Improved Excel import system, duplicate detection fixes, UI improvements and permissions modal fixes
changes: Two-stage Excel import: Analyze then Apply with user decisions on duplicates
Comprehensive duplicate detection for all unique fields: membership_number, receipt_number, medical_council_reg_no
Color-coded conflict badges: blue for Membership, yellow for Receipt, pink for MCR
Per-row error handling: failed rows are skipped without aborting the entire import
Course mapping uses course_code only â€” no dependency on course_name
Field-level validation errors displayed under Row Errors with field name and message
Education import summary shows failed count alongside imported count
Membership number and receipt number normalization in both analyze and apply routes
Segmented Replace/Skip toggle for each duplicate row with Replace All and Skip All buttons
Import modal with 3 steps: Upload, Review Duplicates, and Direct Import
Removed redundant Course Errors section â€” all errors unified under Row Errors
Permissions modal scroll fix: removed internal scrollbar, browser handles scrolling
Requires add_member permission for all import routes

versions.description: Fix import template download and add automatic static asset restoration
changes: Import template bundled in app/assets/ so it survives updates
Automatic static asset restoration on startup if files are missing
Never overwrites existing user files in static directory
Works in both script and frozen (exe) modes

versions.description: Fix Excel import template restoration for PyInstaller builds
changes: PyInstaller spec now bundles app/assets/ directory into the executable
Import template correctly extracted from _MEIPASS and restored to static/ on startup
Permission logic extended: related action permissions grant page access
Members page accessible with any member permission (view, add, edit, delete)
Staff page accessible with any staff permission (manage_users, assign_roles, manage_roles)
Sidebar menu visibility updated to match extended permission logic

versions.description: Fix migration 2.7 failure when dropping index used by foreign key constraint
changes: Migration 2.7 now drops the foreign key before dropping the unique index on member_phones
Correct composite unique key (member_id, phone_number) allows multiple phones per member
Foreign key constraint recreated with ON DELETE CASCADE after schema change
Course combobox now auto-resolves when typing just the course code (e.g. MBBS)

versions.description: Fix fresh install issue where users table was missing when admin table existed
changes: Fresh installs now run all migrations from 1.0 through current version
Migration 2.4 handles all cases: rename admin to users, create fresh users, or skip
Migration chain updated to include version 2.7
Existing installations and data are unaffected

versions.description: Self-healing database initialization for fresh installs, upgrades, and reinstalls
changes: Startup schema validation ensures users, roles, permissions, and role_permissions exist before serving routes
Admin-to-users table migration guard runs automatically on every startup
Fresh installs create RBAC schema directly if neither admin nor users table exists
Schema integrity checker auto-repairs missing tables and columns instead of crashing
Fail-safe error page shown if database initialization fails
Improved startup logging for migration and schema validation steps
Routes only registered after successful database validation

versions.description: Spouse system with education tracking, UI improvements, and migration stability
changes: New spouse management system â€” add optional spouse name and education to each member
Spouse education tracking with college, course, and joining year (same as member education)
Database migration 2.8/2.9: spouse and spouse_education tables with cascade delete constraints plus spouse designation column
Improved spouse UI: compact toggle button [+]/[-] replaces checkbox
Education label wording refined in member and spouse sections for clearer data entry
Smart validation: no empty spouse records created, confirmation required to remove spouse
Cascading deletes: deleting member or spouse auto-removes associated education records
Form state tracking in edit mode: Update button enables only on actual changes
Reuses existing college/course dropdown system for spouse education section
Confirmation dialog shows only before destructive actions (remove spouse), not on add
PyInstaller bundle includes all assets, templates, and migrations for reliable updates

versions.description: Version Bump to trigger update v4.1.6
Database Restore Fixes

changes: Unified search behavior across members, staff, colleges, and courses
Removed plain-text auto-tagging completely
Strict separation between search text and filter tags
Added matched preview rows under each result
Safe highlighting of matched values
Fixed matched_fields JSON serialization crash
Standardized search UX across all pages
Improved search stability and consistency

versions.description: Search system stabilization, match preview UI, and bulk selection system
changes: Unified search behavior across members, staff, colleges, and courses
Fixed plain-text auto-tagging issue in search
Introduced match preview rows showing where results matched
Consistent search + filter separation across all modules
Added bulk selection and bulk delete functionality for all list pages
Select-all now works correctly after live search updates
Bulk delete button visibility improved (shown only when items selected)
Improved event handling using delegated listeners for dynamic DOM updates
General stability fixes and UI consistency improvements

versions.description: Stats system fixes, restore stability, and UI simplification
changes: Fixed stats not updating after database restore
Added automatic stats recalculation after restore and import
Fixed restore flow crash (MySQLCursor connection issue)
Simplified UI: replaced cards with clean total count display
Removed counts from sidebar for cleaner navigation
Improved trash view to show original usernames instead of placeholders
General bug fixes and stability improvements
